calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Kevin D. Frederick, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 235 Berry Street Residential Association.
Gabriella Redick, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Munir Saad.
Default was entered against defendant on July 17, 2009. Amended Default was entered on August 28, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, July 17, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff 235 Berry Street Residential Association, and against the Defaulted Defendant Munir Saad as follows:

Damages/Principal - $17,643.48.
Attorney's Fees - $1,985.00.
Costs - $617.00, for a total of $20,245.48.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
